name: King Ranch Chicken Casserole
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Boneless, skinless chicken breast (cut into small pieces)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a non-stick pan (no oil), stir-fry chicken pieces until done.
2. Mix together soups and tomatoes in a large bowl.
3. Place 11x7 glass baking dish on the stove top. Spray with Pam or grease lightly.
4. Break up enough Doritos to cover the bottom of the dish.
5. Layer half of the chicken, then half of the cheese, then half of the soup mixture on top.
6. Repeat layering with chips, chicken, cheese, and soup.
7. If there are any remaining Doritos or cheese, sprinkle them over the top.
8. Bake at 350°F for 1 hour.
9. Serve side dishes such as sour cream, tomatoes, lettuce, and salsa.
